You can be part of a global leader in technology and innovation, working on cutting-edge server platforms and manufacturing systems while collaborating with top talent across engineering, logistics, and operations and enjoying a dynamic work culture with opportunities for growth and impact. At our US Fulfillment Center in Whitsett, NC, we drive excellence in manufacturing and logistics to support our Infrastructure Solutions Group (ISG). We are seeking a highly experienced and technically skilled Server Test Engineer to lead and optimize server production operations. This role is critical to ensuring high-quality output, process efficiency, and alignment with Lenovo’s global manufacturing standards. Key Responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive testing and validation of server hardware components. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure product quality and reliability. Develop and execute test plans, test cases, and test scripts to Lenovo global standards. Identify, document, and track defects, and work with engineering teams to resolve issues. Strong verbal and written English skills; effective team collaboration. Understanding of validation processes and test methodologies. Work Environment: Fast-paced, collaborative, and innovative environment. Emphasis on safety, sustainability, and continuous improvement. In essence, Test Engineers are the bridge between product design and the finished product, ensuring that manufacturing processes are efficient, cost-effective, and produce high-quality goods. The ideal candidate should demonstrate the ability to work independently in a high-pressure, results-oriented organization and have experience in self-management and motivating cross-functional teams to achieve business KPIs.
